description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat, dark-colored roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a gated entryway with a small fence, large windows, and several balconies adorned with potted plants. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a small outdoor patio area visible on one side. The house is set on a tiled base, suggesting a paved yard or driveway, and the overall structure is composed of white and gray materials with some metallic and glass accents. The windows are large and rectangular, providing ample natural light to the interior. The design emphasizes minimalism and functionality, with a focus on outdoor spaces and greenery.
description: A modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof, large windows, balconies with plants, and a gated entryway on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gated entry, balconies with plants, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a simple wall with minimal windows and a small patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a small balcony, a large arched window, and a visible outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, windows, and the tiled yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a short fence, modern door, and small overhang, accented by potted plants and minimal decorative elements
